docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SCOTT WEISSMAN FILED BY DEFENDANT MISSION ROCK RESIDENTIAL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-12-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-12-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF ANDREW REYES IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MISSION ROCK RESIDENTIAL IS PRESENT; APPEARING IN COURT FOR THE DEFENDANT IS SCOTT WEISSMAN. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-12-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF REYES, ANDREW RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MISSION ROCK RESIDENTIAL $1,284.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,329.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY REYES, ANDREW AS TO DEFENDANT MISSION ROCK RESIDENTIAL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-12-2026 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
